---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

<!--
What are you trying to do that kompress doesn't let you do today? Concrete
scenarios are more useful than "it should support X."
-->

## A proposal

<!-- What would the change look like? UI sketches are welcome but not required. -->

## Alternatives

<!--
Other tools or workflows you've considered, and why they don't fit. This
helps figure out whether the request belongs in kompress or somewhere else.
-->

## Scope check

- [ ] This stays within "compress one or more media files in place." (kompress is intentionally narrow.)
- [ ] This doesn't require keeping cross-platform parity (kompress distribution is macOS-only).
